title: A music exam
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Next week, I am taking a piano exam, so I have been practising every evening. I started learning the piano three years ago, and I have become much more confident (27) then. My teacher says the most important thing is to play slowly and clearly, even if I feel nervous. Last lesson, she listened carefully (28) each piece and told me which parts needed more practice. One piece is more difficult (29) the others because it has several fast sections. I sometimes make mistakes when I try to play it too quickly. My teacher advised me to practise (30) a few minutes at a time rather than for hours without stopping. She also reminded me to breathe calmly before I begin. I am worried (31) the exam, but I know I have prepared well. I hope I will be pleased (32) my result.
